title: Armor Statues Datapack
description: Adds a unique book that allows you to alter the properties of Armor Stands in survival
body:
# **Armor Statues**

A datapack that allows you to modify the settings and pose of armor stands using a book with clickable links. Adds a unique book that allows you to alter the properties of Armor Stands in survival.

 

Everything you should know about this pack
This datapack uses a book of clickable links to modify the settings and pose of armor stands.
Once the datapack is installed, use "/trigger as_help" to see how to obtain the book. (By default this is done by placing an armor stand and a book in a crafting table but this can be changed in the admin settings.)
Admin settings are available using "/function armor_statues:admin" command and include:
Creating and removing a particle shrine for obtaining the book.
Enabling and disabling a crafting method for obtaining the book.
Enabling and disabling a crafting method for obtaining the Pointer Wand and Adjustment wand.
Enabling and disabling the link in the help text for obtaining the book.
Removing unused armor stands; ones that are invisible and do not hold or wear any items.
Enabling the tick speed for armor stand animations.
The help text will be amended to show the selected method(s) of obtaining the book
The help text also includes options to have notification messages in either the action bar or in chat.
 

Full Showcase (by ZombieCleo)
